description: Modules for interacting with cloud storage and service APIs.

modules.name: firebase-storage-utils
modules.description: Utilities for Firebase Storage, enabling file uploads, downloads, listing, and deletion.

functions.name: firebaseStorage.init
functions.description: Initializes the Firebase app and Storage service with your project's configuration.

functions.name: firebaseStorage.isInitialized
functions.description: Checks if the Firebase service has been initialized.

functions.name: firebaseStorage.uploadFile
functions.description: Uploads a file to a specified path in Firebase Storage.

functions.name: firebaseStorage.deleteFile
functions.description: Deletes a file from a specified path in Firebase Storage.

functions.name: firebaseStorage.listFiles
functions.description: Lists all files and subdirectories within a given path.

functions.name: firebaseStorage.getDownloadURL
functions.description: Gets the public downloadable URL for a file.
